`,(0,t.jsx)(r,{name:"use-pagination",code:`"use client";\r
import { useMemo } from "react";\r
import { useUncontrolled } from "@/hooks/use-uncontrolled";\r
\r
export function range(start: number, end: number) {\r
  const length = end - start + 1;\r
  return Array.from({ length }, (_, index) => index + start);\r
}\r
\r
export const DOTS = "dots";\r
\r
export interface PaginationParams {\r
  /** Page selected on initial render, defaults to 1 */\r
  initialPage?: number;\r
  /** Controlled active page number */\r
  page?: number;\r
  /** Total amount of pages */\r
  total: number;\r
  /** Siblings amount on left/right side of selected page, defaults to 1 */\r
  siblings?: number;\r
  /** Amount of elements visible on left/right edges, defaults to 1 */\r
  boundaries?: number;\r
  /** Callback fired after change of each page */\r
  onChange?: (page: number) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export function usePagination({ page, total, onChange, siblings = 1, boundaries = 1, initialPage = 1 }: PaginationParams) {\r
  const _total = Math.max(Math.trunc(total), 0);\r
  const [activePage, setActivePage] = useUncontrolled({\r
    value: page,\r
    onChange,\r
    defaultValue: initialPage,\r
    finalValue: initialPage\r
  });\r
\r
  const setPage = (pageNumber: number) => {\r
    if (pageNumber <= 0) {\r
      setActivePage(1);\r
    } else if (pageNumber > _total) {\r
      setActivePage(_total);\r
    } else {\r
      setActivePage(pageNumber);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const next = () => setPage(activePage + 1);\r
  const previous = () => setPage(activePage - 1);\r
  const first = () => setPage(1);\r
  const last = () => setPage(_total);\r
\r
  const paginationRange = useMemo((): (number | "dots")[] => {\r
    const totalPageNumbers = siblings * 2 + 3 + boundaries * 2;\r
    if (totalPageNumbers >= _total) {\r
      return range(1, _total);\r
    }\r
\r
    const leftSiblingIndex = Math.max(activePage - siblings, boundaries);\r
    const rightSiblingIndex = Math.min(activePage + siblings, _total - boundaries);\r
\r
    const shouldShowLeftDots = leftSiblingIndex > boundaries + 2;\r
    const shouldShowRightDots = rightSiblingIndex < _total - (boundaries + 1);\r
\r
    if (!shouldShowLeftDots && shouldShowRightDots) {\r
      const leftItemCount = siblings * 2 + boundaries + 2;\r
      return [...range(1, leftItemCount), DOTS, ...range(_total - (boundaries - 1), _total)];\r
    }\r
\r
    if (shouldShowLeftDots && !shouldShowRightDots) {\r
      const rightItemCount = boundaries + 1 + 2 * siblings;\r
      return [...range(1, boundaries), DOTS, ...range(_total - rightItemCount, _total)];\r
    }\r
\r
    return [...range(1, boundaries), DOTS, ...range(leftSiblingIndex, rightSiblingIndex), DOTS, ...range(_total - boundaries + 1, _total)];\r
  }, [_total, siblings, activePage]);\r
\r
  return {\r
    range: paginationRange,\r
    active: activePage,\r
    setPage,\r
    next,\r
    previous,\r
    first,\r
    last\r
  };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-pagination.ts"})]})}function c(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,t.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,t.jsx)(u,{...n})}):u(n)}function S(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return P(w);})();
